We'd love to pray

with you.

Everyone is welcome to join us in prayer

Send a prayer request ↓
🙏 Monday prayer 8–9pm
🍳 Prayer breakfast 1st Saturday, 8:30am
💻 Zoom available Monday meetings
👐 Prayer requests Always welcome

"Do not be anxious about anything, but in every situation, by prayer and petition, with thanksgiving, present your requests to God. And the peace of God, which transcends all understanding, will guard your hearts and your minds in Christ Jesus."

Philippians 4:6–7

"Our Father in heaven, hallowed be your name, your kingdom come, your will be done, on earth as it is in heaven. Give us today our daily bread. And forgive us our debts, as we also have forgiven our debtors. And lead us not into temptation, but deliver us from the evil one."

Matthew 6:9–13
🙏

Prayer Times

We meet together as a congregation and with other churches in the area — both online and in person. All are welcome.

Monday Prayer — 8–9pm

A small group meets on Zoom to pray silently or aloud for things on our hearts — the world, our nation, our local community, the church, and personal needs.

  • 1st and 3rd Monday — Zoom and in person at the church
  • Other Mondays — Zoom only

To receive Zoom joining details please tick the box on the prayer request form below, or

contact us directly →

Joint Prayer Breakfast with Cathcart Church of Scotland

Held on the 1st Saturday of each month, 8:30–10am at Cathcart United Free Church. We share breakfast together (8:30–9am) followed by a time of prayer around a theme. All are welcome.

—  GROW ✝ SERVE ✝ SHARE  —
✉️

Prayer Request

If you would like us to pray for you, please fill in the form below with as much or as little information as you wish. All requests are treated with complete confidentiality.

If you would like us to pray with you, please provide a phone number or email address and we will be in touch.

Fields marked * are required.

Your request will be handled with care and confidentiality by our prayer team.

—  GROW ✝ SERVE ✝ SHARE  —
🗓️

Visit Us

Join us on Sundays at 11am or Wednesdays at 10:30am.
